title: Hiring Software Engineer at mfine Global Group

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at mfine Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the mfine Global Group family as a Software Engineer in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About mfine Global Group:
mfine Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine Global Group!
